message:
fix(mermaid): remap sequence activation/note indices after node sort

Sequence activations and notes stored pre-sort node_map indices, but
ir.nodes uses post-sort order. When participants aren't alphabetically
ordered by insertion, activations would render on wrong lifelines and
notes would reference wrong participants.

Also fixes case-insensitive 'as' keyword in parse_sequence_participant
to match Mermaid.js behavior (e.g. 'participant Alice AS Bob').

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
